revision_label.description: Design stage of the document (e.g. schematic, design development, construction docs). Use to compare specs across project stages.
revision_label.usage_hint: Filter to a specific stage: '100% DD', '50% CD', '75% CD'. Comma-separate for multiple: '50% CD,75% CD'

discipline.description: Engineering/design discipline. Acoustic reports and recommendations may appear under 'other'. Partition details are under 'architectural'.

chunk_type.description: Type of content chunk. Use 'acoustic_rating' or 'room_acoustic_requirement' for NC/STC criteria. Use 'entity' for specific building elements. Use 'table_row' for schedule/matrix data. Use 'acoustic_assembly' for wall/floor assembly specs.

sheet_number.description: Drawing sheet number. A8.01 = partition details/schedule. A4.01/A4.02 = floor assembly details. A2.xx = floor plans.
sheet_number.usage_hint: e.g. 'A8.01' for partition details, 'A4.01' for floor assemblies

entity_type.description: Type of building element when chunk_type is 'entity'. Useful for finding specific walls, rooms, equipment, etc.

rating_type.description: Type of acoustic rating. Use for finding specific acoustic criteria like NC levels, STC requirements, or vibration specs.
rating_type.usage_hint: e.g. 'NC' for noise criteria, 'STC' for sound transmission, 'IIC' for impact insulation, 'vibration'

is_current_revision.description: If true, returns only the latest revision of each document. Useful when you want the most current specs only.
is_current_revision.usage_hint: Set to true to get only the latest version

page_class.description: Visual classification of the page. 'text_heavy' = report pages, meeting notes, specifications. 'drawing' = architectural/engineering drawings. 'schedule' = data tables and schedules.
page_class.usage_hint: Use 'text_heavy' for acoustic reports and recommendations. Use 'drawing' for partition/assembly details.

document_class.description: How the document was processed. 'text_native' = text-based PDFs like reports, specs, and meeting notes. 'unknown' = image-based PDFs like architectural drawings.
document_class.usage_hint: Use 'text_native' to search reports/specs/meeting notes. Use 'unknown' for drawing sheets.

assembly_id.description: Specific partition type, wall assembly, or floor assembly identifier. Directly targets a named assembly.
assembly_id.usage_hint: e.g. 'KS', 'KA', 'PS', 'HA', 'FA4', 'RA5', 'JB'. Use when you know the assembly name.

source_file_name.description: Name of the source PDF file. Use to target a specific document directly.
source_file_name.usage_hint: e.g. the acoustic report PDF name to search only within that document

drawing_type.description: Type of drawing (e.g. 'Floor Plan', 'Partition Details & Schedules', 'Detail Drawings'). Very large list, use only when you know the exact type.

semantic_unit_type.description: Semantic categorization of the chunk content. Similar to chunk_type but more granular.

page_number.description: The specific page number in the source PDF. Useful for finding data on a known page.

primary_discipline.description: The high-level category of the document. Use 'architectural' for main drawings, 'other' for reports/notes.

low_confidence_extraction.description: If true, the data was extracted with lower vision-AI confidence. Set to false for highest accuracy.
low_confidence_extraction.usage_hint: Set to false to filter out potentially noisy OCR results

revision_sequence.description: The chronological order of the document. Higher numbers mean later versions.
revision_sequence.usage_hint: Use for finding the most recent vs oldest versions in a series.
